zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Jernegan於1288年出生在英國素福爾可索莫利頓時，他的父親Walter Jernegan38歲，母親Isabell FitzOsbert38歲。他於1303年與Alice Germayne在英國素福爾可索莫利頓結婚。他於1338年被列為coroner of suffolk 。他去世於1346年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可索莫利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Jernegan于1288年出生在英国素福爾可索莫利頓时，他的父亲Walter Jernegan38岁，母亲Isabell FitzOsbert38岁。他于1303年与Alice Germayne在英国素福爾可索莫利頓结婚。他于1338年被列为coroner of suffolk 。他去世于1346年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可索莫利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Jernegan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): of uncertain origin. Reaney believes it to be of Breton origin, probably identical with the Old Breton personal name Iarnuuocon ‘iron famous’, taken to East Anglia by Bretons at the time of the Norman Conquest. Compare Journigan .
History: Thomas Jernigan was granted land at Somerton, VA, in 1668. Many of his descendants were sea captains. His son, also called Thomas, settled on Martha's Vineyard, MA, in 1712.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Jernegan was born in 1288, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, his father, Walter Jernegan, was 38 and his mother, Isabell FitzOsbert, was 38. He married Alice Germayne in 1303, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. In 1338, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as coroner of suffolk . He died in 1346, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Jernegan est né en 1288, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter Jernegan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabell FitzOsbert, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Alice Germayne en 1303, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre. En 1338, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est coroner of suffolk . Il est décédé en 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Jernegan 1288 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Jernegan 38 und seine Mutter Isabell FitzOsbert 38. Er hat 1303 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England Alice Germayne geheiratet. 1338, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als coroner of suffolk  aufgeführt. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Jernegan è nato il nel 1288 nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Walter Jernegan, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Isabell FitzOsbert, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Alice Germayne nel 1303, nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. Nel 1338, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come coroner of suffolk . Morì nel 1346, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Jerneganが1288年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンで生まれた時，父Walter Jerneganは38歳，母Isabell FitzOsbertは38歳であった。1303年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンでAlice Germayneと結婚した。1338年，50歳の時，職業はcoroner of suffolk と記録されている。彼は1346年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクソメルリートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Jernegan(이)가 1288년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Jernegan(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell FitzOsbert(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1303년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 Alice Germayne(와)과 결혼했다. 1338년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 coroner of suffolk 이었다. 그는 1346년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Jernegan nasceu em 1288, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Jernegan, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabell FitzOsbert, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Germayne em 1303, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Em 1338, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como coroner of suffolk . Ele faleceu em 1346, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Jernegan родился в 1288 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Jernegan было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell FitzOsbert, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Germayne в 1303 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия. В 1338 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии coroner of suffolk . Он умер в 1346 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Jernegan nació en 1288, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Jernegan, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabell FitzOsbert, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Alice Germayne en 1303, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. En 1338, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era coroner of suffolk . Murió en 1346, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
